Appearance

zopen communityOpen Source for z/OS

Bringing open-source tools to IBM z/OS, making mainframes modern, accessible, and developer-friendly

Get Started
View on GitHub
🚀

Installation made easy!

```bash bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zopencommunity/meta/HEAD/tools/zopen_install.sh)" ```

🛠️

200+ Open Source Projects

Browse our extensive collection of ported tools and libraries for z/OS

📦

Package Manager

Easy installation and management of open source tools on z/OS

🤝

Community Driven

Join our active community of developers and contributors

📊

Track Progress

Stay informed with our project status and currency tracking

🔧

Developer Friendly

Comprehensive guides for using, developing, and porting tools

🛠️ Explore & Engage ​

  • Start Here: Jumpstart your zopen community journey with our Quick Start Guide
  • Discover: Browse our available tools
  • Status Check: Stay informed with our progress

🤝 Collaborate & Contribute ​

  • Feedback Hub: Share insights and spark discussions through the community discussion
  • Issues: Discovered a bug? Open an issue
  • Get Involved: Whether you're looking to use, develop, or document tools, there's a place for you here

📣 Let's Shape the Future Together! ​

Your passion drives our progress. Engage, innovate, and collaborate to elevate the zopen community.

  • Fill our survey: Fill our survey to help shape the future of the zopen community
  • Enjoying zopen community? We'd love to get a testimonial from you! Share it by emailing us

Let's make our tools even better together! 🌟
